tools.name: device_info
tools.description: Return the target FPGA device info: family, device name, package, speed grade, and available resource totals (LUT, FF, BRAM, DSP, PLL).

tools.name: synth_run
tools.description: Trigger Yosys synthesis on the current HDL source. Returns a job ID. Use synth_status to poll for results.

top_module.description: Name of the top-level Verilog/VHDL module to synthesize.

target_device.description: Target device family (e.g. ice40, ecp5). Defaults to configured device.

tools.name: synth_status
tools.description: Return the result of the most recent synthesis run: status (running/done/failed), module count, cell count, warnings, errors.

job_id.description: Job ID from synth_run. If omitted, returns status of most recent run.

tools.name: impl_run
tools.description: Trigger nextpnr place-and-route on the last successful synthesis result. Returns a job ID.

seed.description: P&R random seed. Change seed if routing fails. Default: 1.

freq_mhz.description: Target clock frequency in MHz for timing-driven P&R.

tools.name: impl_status
tools.description: Return the result of the most recent place-and-route run: status, routing success/fail, wire usage percentage.

job_id.description: Job ID from impl_run. If omitted, returns status of most recent run.

tools.name: timing_report
tools.description: Return the timing analysis from the last P&R run: critical path delay, worst slack, violated paths count, and per-clock-domain summary.

verbose.description: If true, include full critical path details. Default: false.

tools.name: resource_usage
tools.description: Return FPGA resource utilization from the last P&R run: LUT, FF, BRAM, DSP, PLL — each as used count, total count, and percentage.

tools.name: lint_report
tools.description: Run Verilator lint check on the current HDL source and return all warnings and errors with file name, line number, and message.

top_module.description: Top-level module to lint. If omitted, lints all files in hdl/rtl/.

strict.description: If true, treat warnings as errors. Default: false.

tools.name: sim_run
tools.description: Trigger Verilator or GHDL simulation for a specified testbench. Returns a job ID.

testbench.description: Name of the testbench module to simulate (must exist in hdl/tb/).

timeout_cycles.description: Maximum simulation cycles before timeout. Default: 1000000.

save_waveform.description: If true, save VCD waveform for waveform_export. Default: false.

tools.name: sim_result
tools.description: Return the result of the most recent simulation: pass/fail, cycle count, assertion results, last 50 lines of simulation log.

job_id.description: Job ID from sim_run. If omitted, returns result of most recent simulation.

tools.name: constraint_validate
tools.description: Validate the device constraint file (.pcf / .lpf / .xdc) against the current design's port list and the target device's pin map.

constraint_file.description: Path to the constraint file relative to the project root. If omitted, uses the default constraint for the target device.

tools.name: bitstream_flash
tools.description: Flash the latest bitstream to the connected FPGA via USB using iceprog (iCE40) or openFPGALoader (ECP5). Returns programming result.

device_path.description: USB device path. If omitted, auto-detects the connected FPGA programmer.

verify.description: If true, read back bitstream after programming to verify. Default: true.

tools.name: waveform_export
tools.description: Export a portion of the last simulation waveform as a text summary of signal values over time. Requires sim_run was called with save_waveform: true.

signals.description: List of signal names to include in export. If empty, exports all top-level signals.

start_cycle.description: Start cycle for waveform export. Default: 0.

end_cycle.description: End cycle for waveform export. Default: last cycle.
